final:
module top_module(
	input [11:0] imagPart,
	input [11:0] realPart,
	output reg [11:0] minimum);always @ * begin
		if(imagPart > realPart)
			minimum = realPart;
		else
			minimum = imagPart;
	end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      minimum = imagPart; if (realPart < imagPart) begin
        minimum = realPart;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
